impact: This advances the PP&D daemon recovery plan by proving the committed checkbox-128 fixture constrains syntax-failure retries to a narrow, safe shape and defers crawler/live automation work.
summary: Add fixture validation for checkbox-128 retry prompt guardrails.
target_task: Task checkbox-129: Task checkbox-129: Add validation for the checkbox-128 fixture proving the prompt names the failed syntax kind, lists the allowed one-file retry shape, and explicitly defers live crawl, authenticated automation, and crawler contract implementation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
